entries.name: Anthropic Skills
entries.description: Anthropic's official skill collection; net-new sub-skills not in the bundled office set: theme-factory, mcp-builder, webapp-testing, canvas-design, algorithmic-art, web-artifacts-builder.
entries.license: mixed: example-skills Apache-2.0; docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx source-available (not OSS)
entries.safety: clean (curl references are Claude-API doc examples, not installers); doc set is source-available — note the license split

entries.name: Anthropic Claude Code Plugins
entries.description: Anthropic-authored Claude Code plugins: code-review, pr-review-toolkit, feature-dev, security-guidance. Complementary to the kit's /diff-review + cso/audit-infra (note the overlap).
entries.safety: clean (Anthropic-authored; security-guidance is itself a safety hook); overlaps the kit's /diff-review + cso/audit-infra

entries.name: wshobson Agents Marketplace
entries.description: Multi-harness agent/command/skill plugin marketplace for general dev workflows.
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: Get Shit Done (GSD)
entries.description: Spec-driven / meta-prompting workflow system (agents + commands).
entries.safety: clean (star count is web-search-inflated; treat as a floor)

entries.name: Get Shit Pretty (GSP)
entries.description: Design-engineering system for AI coding agents (the design counterpart to GSD): 45+ skills + 13 sub-agents covering brand strategy, identity, design systems, UI build, accessibility, and critique via a dual-diamond pipeline, with 35 style presets. Not Solana-specific.

install.command: pnpm dlx get-shit-pretty   # or: bunx get-shit-pretty
env: FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN (optional, for the bundled Figma MCP)

entries.safety: caution: ships auto-running Claude Code hooks (gsp/hooks/hooks.json) + bin/install.js merges hooks+statusline into settings.json — review before installing; otherwise MIT, no telemetry/curl|sh

entries.name: Dev Browser
entries.description: Gives the agent a real web browser for frontend QA, testing, and scraping.
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: iOS Simulator Skill
entries.description: xcodebuild wrapper to drive the iOS Simulator; pairs with the kit's build-mobile.
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: Frontend Slides
entries.description: Build animation-rich HTML slide decks (synergy with the kit's pitch-deck).
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: AnyDesign
entries.description: Turn an image / URL / Figma reference into design.md design tokens; closest genre-mate to animation-principles.
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: WebGPU Claude Skill
entries.description: WebGPU + Three.js graphics skill for the browser.
entries.safety: clean (no license — do not vendor/redistribute until clarified)

entries.name: SwiftUI Design Skill
entries.description: Anti-AI-slop SwiftUI design rules for Apple/mobile builders.
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: Animation Principles
entries.description: Genre-template skill for motion / animation design principles (pure prose).
entries.safety: clean — pure-prose, zero scripts/installers; stale (~Dec 2025), unmaintained

entries.name: Emil Kowalski Motion Skill
entries.description: Motion / interaction design skill from a renowned motion author (Sonner, Vaul).
entries.safety: clean (no license — do not vendor/redistribute until clarified); stale (~Mar 2026)

entries.name: Brand Design (md)
entries.description: Brand-design reference in markdown.
entries.safety: clean (no license — do not vendor/redistribute until clarified); overlaps solana-new brand-design

entries.name: UX Writing Skill
entries.description: Systematic UX microcopy: onboarding, error, empty-state and button copy with quality standards.
entries.safety: clean (one build-skill.sh builder, not runtime)

entries.name: Design Skills (UX process)
entries.description: UX-process breadth: 10 skills incl. ux-research, design-critique, journey-mapping, a11y-audit.
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: Scientific Agent Skills
entries.description: 140 science skills + 100 database connectors; best-in-class for data-heavy builders.
entries.safety: clean

entries.name: Claude D3.js Skill
entries.description: D3 data-visualization skill for dashboards.
entries.safety: clean (no license — do not vendor/redistribute until clarified); stale (~Oct 2025)

entries.name: Claude Skills Marketplace (mhattingpete)
entries.description: Plugin marketplace: git + test + code-review pack.
entries.safety: clean; borderline stale (~Mar 2026)

entries.name: Playwright Skill
entries.description: De-facto Playwright skill for browser automation and webapp testing.
entries.safety: clean; stale (~Dec 2025)

entries.name: Vercel Plugin
entries.description: Full Vercel plugin: 28 skills + 3 agents + official read-only Vercel MCP (Next.js/React/AI-SDK frontend bundle).
entries.safety: caution: telemetry ON by default (anonymized DAU pings, no content); opt-out VERCEL_PLUGIN_TELEMETRY=off

entries.name: Meteora SDK Skill
entries.description: Meteora DLMM SDK-depth skill (net-new vs solana-new; sendai already ships a meteora skill — add only for SDK-level depth).
entries.safety: clean; overlaps the bundled sendai meteora skill — confirm SDK-depth delta before adding

entries.name: x402 Proxy MCP
entries.description: Agent-payments proxy MCP (x402). Net-new vs solana-new (its x402-mcp is a different git-clone impl).

install.command: claude mcp add x402-proxy -- npx -y x402-proxy

entries.safety: caution: BIP-39 key custody for agent payments — isolate keys, explicit opt-in only, never a default

entries.name: Pyth Pro MCP
entries.description: Pyth Pro price-feed MCP: 500+ feeds, low latency. Net-new vs solana-new (Pyth appears only as a dependency keyword there).
entries.safety: caution: paid API key (billable); no custody risk

entries.name: Chainstack MCP
entries.description: Hosted unified multi-chain RPC MCP. Net-new vs solana-new.

install.command: claude mcp add --transport http chainstack https://mcp.chainstack.com/mcp

entries.safety: caution: hosted multi-chain RPC — check data-retention policy

entries.name: Noesis MCP
entries.description: Hosted token-intelligence MCP. Net-new vs solana-new.

install.command: claude mcp add --transport http noesis https://noesisapi.dev/mcp

entries.safety: caution: hosted token-intel — verify provenance/traction before trusting

entries.name: DexPaprika MCP
entries.description: Free, no-key DEX market-data MCP. Net-new vs solana-new (its DEX-data MCP is a different provider).

install.command: claude mcp add dexpaprika -- npx -y dexpaprika-mcp

entries.safety: clean; free no-key DEX market data, low-risk read-only

entries.name: Phantom MCP
entries.description: Phantom wallet MCP — can sign/submit transactions. Also cataloged in solana-new (phantom-mcp-server); kept here because the signing-custody warning is load-bearing.
entries.safety: caution: wallet signing — can sign/submit transactions; explicit user consent only, never a default (key-custody risk)

entries.name: gmem
entries.description: Agent memory layer (watchlist — young/unverified).
entries.safety: caution: unverified — confirm maintenance + license before any use

entries.name: Snap Protocol
entries.description: Snapshot/state protocol skill (watchlist — young/unverified).
entries.safety: caution: early — verify reachability + traction before any use

entries.name: Seeker Skills
entries.description: Solana Seeker (mobile) skills (watchlist — young/unverified). Cross-check vs ext/solana-mobile coverage.
entries.safety: caution: niche mobile, unverified — cross-check vs ext/solana-mobile before adding

entries.name: SATI (SAID/SATI/AIP)
entries.description: Agent-identity standards (SAID/SATI/AIP). Not a skill yet — emerging standard (watchlist). Net-new vs solana-new.
entries.safety: caution: emerging standard, not a skill yet — monitor for adoption

entries.name: Anthropic Claude Plugins Community Index
entries.description: Scout source: 2,201-plugin community index; discovery source, NOT first-party-vetted. Not installable.

entries.name: Solana TX Debugger Skill
entries.description: Diagnose failed Solana transactions: decode error codes (Anchor, SPL, Token-2022, System), identify root cause from logs and CPI depth, and prescribe concrete fixes with code snippets. Includes 22+ real-world error recipes, compute budget optimization, ALT/versioned tx guidance, and simulation-based pre-send debugging.
entries.safety: clean — pure markdown skill, no scripts/binaries beyond standard install.sh

entries.name: Nansen
entries.description: Institutional on-chain analytics via Nansen's hosted MCP: wallet labeling/profiler, smart-money flows, token analytics (DEX trades, OHLCV, screener, quant scores), PnL, holder analysis. 18+ chains including Solana. Net-new vs solana-new.

install.command: claude mcp add --transport http nansen https://mcp.nansen.ai/ra/mcp --header "NANSEN-API-KEY: ${NANSEN_API_KEY}"

entries.safety: caution: SaaS data-routing — queries and API key sent to mcp.nansen.ai (Nansen servers); key passed in request header; free tier 100 credits, paid ~$0.001/credit or $0.01–$0.05/x402 call; opt-in only
